speaker: speaker1
text: Hello , Miss Wu , This is Dan Robson calling from OTC limited . I'd like to check my last order . When exactly was it sent out ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I can check that for you right now . Would you mind holding ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Mr . Robson , I'm sorry . Our computer system is down . Could I call you back later ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Sure . Do you have my number ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , I have it right here . I'm so sorry about this .

speaker: speaker1
text: No problem . I'll wait for your call .
